kushal@fedora:~/src/rust/myinkbird$ cd ~/src/rust/myinkbird/; time bash export.sh > docs/llm/vendor/output.txt; time systemctl status bluetooth; time bash scripts/container-build.sh; time bash scripts/run.sh;

user	0m0.857s
